_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: Both of the NF1 MPNST lines show sustained ERK activation in response to EGF stimulation
details: Shows sustained ERK activation and prolonged EGFR phosphorylation in response to EGF stimulation
